map.formula: Array.from({length:42},(_,i)=>{const yr=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-year']??2026;const mo=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-month']??0;const fd=new Date(yr,mo,1).getDay();const dim=new Date(yr,mo+1,0).getDate();const dn=i-fd+1;const inM=dn>=1&&dn<=dim;const d=dn<1?new Date(yr,mo,0).getDate()+dn:(dn>dim?dn-dim:dn);const ds=inM?yr+'-'+String(mo+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d).padStart(2,'0'):'';const today=new Date();const tStr=today.getFullYear()+'-'+String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(today.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const sel=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-selected']||'';return{day:d,inMonth:inM,dateStr:ds,isToday:ds===tStr,isSelected:ds===sel&&ds.length>0,idx:i}})

map.js: const kd=variables['showcase-kanban-drag']; const all=variables['showcase-kanban-cards']??[]; const cards=all.filter(c=>c.col==='todo'); if(!kd?.cardId) return cards; if(kd.targetCol==='todo'&&kd.sourceCol!=='todo'){ const ti=Math.max(0,Math.min(cards.length,kd.targetIndex??0)); const r=[...cards]; r.splice(ti,0,{id:'__placeholder__',title:'',col:'todo',_placeholder:true}); return r; } return cards;

transform.js: const kd=variables['showcase-kanban-drag']; const myId=context.item.data.id; if(!kd?.cardId||myId==='__placeholder__') return 'none'; const col='todo'; const sh=84; if(kd.sourceCol===col&&kd.targetCol===col){ const cards=(variables['showcase-kanban-cards']??[]).filter(c=>c.col===col); const di=cards.findIndex(c=>c.id===kd.cardId); const ti=kd.targetIndex??di; const mi=context.item.data.index; if(myId===kd.cardId) return 'none'; if(mi>di&&mi<=ti) return 'translateY(-'+sh+'px)'; if(mi<di&&mi>=ti) return 'translateY('+sh+'px)'; return 'none'; } if(kd.sourceCol===col&&kd.targetCol!==col){ const cards=(variables['showcase-kanban-cards']??[]).filter(c=>c.col===col); const di=cards.findIndex(c=>c.id===kd.cardId); const mi=context.item.data.index; if(myId===kd.cardId) return 'none'; if(mi>di) return 'translateY(-'+sh+'px)'; return 'none'; } return 'none';

map.js: const kd=variables['showcase-kanban-drag']; const all=variables['showcase-kanban-cards']??[]; const cards=all.filter(c=>c.col==='done'); if(!kd?.cardId) return cards; if(kd.targetCol==='done'&&kd.sourceCol!=='done'){ const ti=Math.max(0,Math.min(cards.length,kd.targetIndex??0)); const r=[...cards]; r.splice(ti,0,{id:'__placeholder__',title:'',col:'done',_placeholder:true}); return r; } return cards;

transform.js: const kd=variables['showcase-kanban-drag']; const myId=context.item.data.id; if(!kd?.cardId||myId==='__placeholder__') return 'none'; const col='done'; const sh=84; if(kd.sourceCol===col&&kd.targetCol===col){ const cards=(variables['showcase-kanban-cards']??[]).filter(c=>c.col===col); const di=cards.findIndex(c=>c.id===kd.cardId); const ti=kd.targetIndex??di; const mi=context.item.data.index; if(myId===kd.cardId) return 'none'; if(mi>di&&mi<=ti) return 'translateY(-'+sh+'px)'; if(mi<di&&mi>=ti) return 'translateY('+sh+'px)'; return 'none'; } if(kd.sourceCol===col&&kd.targetCol!==col){ const cards=(variables['showcase-kanban-cards']??[]).filter(c=>c.col===col); const di=cards.findIndex(c=>c.id===kd.cardId); const mi=context.item.data.index; if(myId===kd.cardId) return 'none'; if(mi>di) return 'translateY(-'+sh+'px)'; return 'none'; } return 'none';
